name: ssh-tool
description: SSH multi-hop tool for AI agents - MCP support, daemon, file transfer, background exec

scripts.test:fast: npm run build:test && node --test --test-force-exit dist/__tests__/batched-persistence.test.js dist/__tests__/cli-scheduler-contract.test.js dist/__tests__/concurrency.test.js dist/__tests__/connection.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-background-handle.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-client-race.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-ipc.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-scheduler.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-streaming-runner.test.js dist/__tests__/event-log-debounce.test.js dist/__tests__/event-log.test.js dist/__tests__/exec-task-manager-delegate.test.js dist/__tests__/exec-task-manager-host.test.js dist/__tests__/exec-task-manager-list.test.js dist/__tests__/exec-task-manager-memory.test.js dist/__tests__/exec-task-manager-scheduler-read.test.js dist/__tests__/file-transfer-sftp-end.test.js dist/__tests__/ipc-parser.test.js dist/__tests__/ipc-protocol-malformed.test.js dist/__tests__/ipc-socket.test.js dist/__tests__/lock-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/logger-debounce.test.js dist/__tests__/logger.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-response.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-scheduler-contract.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-wrap-tool.test.js dist/__tests__/migrator.test.js dist/__tests__/normalize-config.test.js dist/__tests__/output-store-bytes.test.js dist/__tests__/output-store-lazy.test.js dist/__tests__/output-store.test.js dist/__tests__/profile-manager-cache.test.js dist/__tests__/profile-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-classifier.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-hooks.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-persistence.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-pump-queue.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-recent.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-service.test.js dist/__tests__/session-manager.test.js dist/__tests__/ssh-config.test.js dist/__tests__/ssh-test-key.test.js dist/__tests__/virtual-cwd.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon.test.js dist/__tests__/gateway.test.js
scripts.test:scheduler: npm run build:test && node --test dist/__tests__/scheduler-classifier.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-service.test.js dist/__tests__/scheduler-persistence.test.js dist/__tests__/output-store.test.js dist/__tests__/virtual-cwd.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-scheduler.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-streaming-runner.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-scheduler-contract.test.js dist/__tests__/cli-scheduler-contract.test.js dist/__tests__/concurrency.test.js dist/__tests__/multi-session-concurrency.test.js
scripts.test:ssh: npm run build:test && node --test --test-force-exit dist/__tests__/daemon.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-shell.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-fs.test.js dist/__tests__/remote-tools.test.js dist/__tests__/connection.test.js dist/__tests__/gateway.test.js dist/__tests__/multi-hop-auth.test.js dist/__tests__/file-transfer.test.js dist/__tests__/file-transfer-multi-hop.test.js dist/__tests__/port-forwarding.test.js dist/__tests__/error-handling.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-server.test.js dist/__tests__/mcp-profile-switch.test.js dist/__tests__/session-reuse.test.js dist/__tests__/agent-auth.test.js dist/__tests__/daemon-lifecycle.test.js dist/__tests__/performance.test.js dist/__tests__/integration.test.js
scripts.test:load: npm run build:test && node --test dist/__tests__/stress-test.test.js dist/__tests__/concurrency.test.js dist/__tests__/multi-session-concurrency.test.js
